title: Mahalakshmi Temple
tagline: Mahalakshmi Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Mahalakshmi Temple (also known as Ambabai Mandir) is an important Hindu temple and shakti peeth dedicated to Goddess Mahalakshmi, who is worshipped by locals as Ambabai.
overview.description: Mahalakshmi Temple (also known as Ambabai Mandir) is an important Hindu temple and shakti peeth dedicated to Goddess Mahalakshmi, who is worshipped by locals as Ambabai. Goddess Mahalakshmi is the consort of Maha Vishnu and it is one of shakta pithas in India. It is believed that Ambabai have appeared to kill demon Kolhasur here.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Terminus
topPlaces.description: Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Terminus (officially Shri Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Terminus Kolhapur) (station code: KOP) is the main railway terminus in the city of Kolhapur, India. It is the end point of the Miraj to Kolhapur railway line and falls under Pune division.

topPlaces.name: Chhatrapati Shahu Stadium
topPlaces.description: Chhatrapati Shahu Football Stadium is a historic football stadium in Kolhapur, Maharashtra, India.[1]

topPlaces.name: Shri Chhatrapati Shivaji Stadium
topPlaces.description: Shri Chhatrapati Shivaji Stadium or Kolhapur Cricket Association Ground is a multi-purpose stadium in Kolhapur, Maharashtra. The stadium has hosted many of first-class and List A matches for Maharashtra cricket team.

topPlaces.name: Kolhapur
topPlaces.description: Kolhapur () is a city on the banks of the Panchganga River in the southern part of the Indian state of Maharashtra. Kolhapur is one of the most significant cities in South Maharashtra and has been a hub of historical, religious, and cultural activities for centuries.

topPlaces.name: Khasbag Wrestling Stadium
topPlaces.description: Khasbag Stadium is a national wrestling stadium in Kolhapur city, Maharashtra, India. This is a biggest wrestling stadium in India.

topPlaces.name: Deccan States Agency
topPlaces.description: The Deccan States Agency, also known as the Deccan States Agency and Kolhapur Residency, was a political agency of India, managing the relations of the Government of India with a collection of princely states and jagirs (feudal 'vassal' estates) in western India.

topPlaces.name: Kolhapur State
topPlaces.description: The Kolhapur State was a Maratha princely state of India, under the Deccan Division of the Bombay Presidency, and later the Deccan States Agency. It was considered the most important of the Maratha principalities with the others being Baroda State, Gwalior State and Indore State.

topPlaces.name: New Palace, Kolhapur
topPlaces.description: New Palace, Kolhapur is a palace situated in Kolhapur, in the Indian state of Maharashtra. The Palace took 7 years to complete, from 1877 to 1884, costing about seven lakhs of rupees.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Terminus & around

items.note: Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Terminus (officially Shri Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Terminus Kolhapur) (station code: KOP) is the main railway terminus in the city of Kolhapur, India. It is the end point of the Miraj to Kolhapur railway line and falls under Pune division.
Chhatrapati Shahu Football Stadium is a historic football stadium in Kolhapur, Maharashtra, India.[1]

Shri Chhatrapati Shivaji Stadium or Kolhapur Cricket Association Ground is a multi-purpose stadium in Kolhapur, Maharashtra. The stadium has hosted many of first-class and List A matches for Maharashtra cricket team.

Kolhapur () is a city on the banks of the Panchganga River in the southern part of the Indian state of Maharashtra. Kolhapur is one of the most significant cities in South Maharashtra and has been a hub of historical, religious, and cultural activities for centuries.
Khasbag Stadium is a national wrestling stadium in Kolhapur city, Maharashtra, India. This is a biggest wrestling stadium in India.

The Deccan States Agency, also known as the Deccan States Agency and Kolhapur Residency, was a political agency of India, managing the relations of the Government of India with a collection of princely states and jagirs (feudal 'vassal' estates) in western India.

The Kolhapur State was a Maratha princely state of India, under the Deccan Division of the Bombay Presidency, and later the Deccan States Agency. It was considered the most important of the Maratha principalities with the others being Baroda State, Gwalior State and Indore State.
New Palace, Kolhapur is a palace situated in Kolhapur, in the Indian state of Maharashtra. The Palace took 7 years to complete, from 1877 to 1884, costing about seven lakhs of rupees.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahalakshmi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahalakshmi Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahalakshmi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (7 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (152 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahalakshmi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahalakshmi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahalakshmi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mahalakshmi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahalakshmi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Terminus, Chhatrapati Shahu Stadium, Shri Chhatrapati Shivaji Stadium, Kolhapur, Khasbag Wrestling Stadium.
